SEEN_BEFORE: NO

This kernel appears to be a synthetic/toy microbenchmark, likely hand-crafted to test specific memory access patterns (the `& 4095` masking to keep accesses within a 4096-element range, the stride-17 and stride-257 access patterns). It doesn't match any well-known benchmark, tutorial, or public codebase I'm aware of. It looks like something someone wrote to experiment with or illustrate irregular memory access patterns and their performance characteristics.
